basic_details.job_title: HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Driver-cum-Office Assistant posts! Published at HPSLSA Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 11 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18 to 45 years age group and possessing a Graduate degree from a recognized University along with a valid LMV Driving Licence and minimum 3 years driving experience can apply online from 14-05-2026 to 13-06-2026. Find all details about the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online for

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years as on 01.01.2026 Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University. Must possess a valid Driving Licence for Light Motor Vehicles (LMV) and have a minimum driving experience of three (3) years. Preference to candidates with good mechanical knowledge of automobiles.
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University. Valid Driving Licence for Light Motor Vehicles (LMV). Minimum driving experience of three (3) years.

selection_process: Screening Test Proficiency (driving) test Verification of documents
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPSLSA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant recruitment is 13 June 2026. Ensure all applications and fee payments are completed by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for candidates applying for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post is 18 years as of 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant position is 45 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university and possess a valid Driving Licence for Light Motor Vehicles (LMV) with at least three years of driving experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post by the Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of ₹20,000/- per month for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for Unreserved category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for Unreserved (UR) category candidates is ₹450/-. This fee needs to be paid online during the application process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening Test, a Proficiency (driving) test, and Document Verification. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the post.

faq.question: Q9. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website or the provided link.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains detailed information about the recruitment.
